headline: Fastenal (FAST) Appoints Jeff Wat As CEO As Q2 And Digital Growth Hold Up
summary: Fastenal announced a CEO transition, with Jeff Wat taking over from Dan Florness. The leadership change coincides with continued digital growth and a solid Q2 performance. Fastenal highlighted ongoing expansion in its digital and inventory management services. Fastenal, traded as NasdaqGS:FAST, is pairing a leadership change with an update on its operating performance. The company reported a robust Q2 and pointed to further traction in its digital and inventory management offerings, while...
